summary: Adjusted the opening away from the neighboring lock-and-timer scaffold, rephrased Ember's final terminal copy to remove calibration-only language, and tightened the last line so the chapter hands off more cleanly into the six o'clock unlock.
edits: Re-anchored the opening on Jae-won's watch check instead of starting on the terminal clock.
Rephrased Ember's final message to preserve the same beat without repeating a style-bible example line.
Adjusted the closing sentence so the remaining countdown points forward into Chapter 18's unlock.
